name: slider
title: Slider
description: Track scrubber with bar or line chrome, optional label, leading icon, and value readout.

api.description: Track scrubber with bar or line chrome. Optional label, leading icon, and value readout. While scrubbing, the thumb and fill follow the pointer continuously; the committed value snaps to step.

props.name: min
props.description: Minimum value.

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum value.

props.name: step
props.description: Increment between committed values. The thumb still tracks the pointer smoothly while dragging.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled value as an array (single thumb uses one entry). Values outside min to max are snapped to step and clamped for the fill and aria value.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled initial value.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Called when the committed value changes. Receives stepped values while scrubbing and on keyboard input.

props.name: variant
props.description: Track chrome. bar is a filled pill track. line is a thin mute rail with a thicker active segment and a circular thumb.

props.name: label
props.description: Optional heading text or content above the track. Wired to the thumb as the accessible name when aria-label is omitted.

props.name: leading
props.description: Optional leading content before the label, such as an icon.

props.name: showValue
props.description: Show the live value on the right of the header. Defaults to true when label, leading, or formatValue is set.

props.name: valueFormat
props.description: Built in readout format when formatValue is omitted. number uses step precision. percent shows the position across min to max with a percent sign.

props.name: formatValue
props.description: Custom readout and aria valuetext. Overrides valueFormat when set.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disabled slider.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Accessible name applied to the slider thumb.

props.name: aria-labelledby
props.description: ID of a labeling element for the slider thumb. Defaults to the label element when label is set.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional styles on the root.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles on the root. Can also override Slider CSS variables directly.

groups.title: Tokens
groups.description: variant line remaps track and range heights to the line tokens. Prop and style overrides still win.

props.name: --primary
props.description: Active fill (both variants) and bar thumb border.

props.name: --foreground
props.description: Label text, leading icon, and line thumb border.

props.name: --muted
props.description: Bar track background.

props.name: --muted-foreground
props.description: Value readout text.

props.name: --background
props.description: Thumb fill.

props.name: --df-slider-track-height
props.description: Bar track height.

props.name: --df-slider-line-track-height
props.description: Line variant mute rail height.

props.name: --df-slider-line-range-height
props.description: Line variant active segment height.

props.name: --df-slider-header-gap
props.description: Gap between the header and the track.

props.name: --df-slider-label-gap
props.description: Gap between leading content and the label.

props.name: --df-slider-leading-size
props.description: Leading icon box size.

props.name: --df-affordance-size-sm
props.description: Thumb size.

props.name: --spacing-unit
props.description: Base unit for track, thumb, and header sizes.
